title: AI Strategy for Executives
tagline: Lead the AI transformation — don't just survive it
description: A working session for leadership teams who need more than a trends briefing. Built from patterns observed deploying AI inside regulated enterprises, this half-day gets your executive team to a shared vocabulary, an honest readiness assessment, and a 90-day roadmap you own by the time you leave the room.
objectives: Establish a shared, hype-free vocabulary for AI decisions
Leave with a 90-day roadmap the leadership team co-authored
outcomes: Assess your organization's AI readiness across people, process, and infrastructure
Build a 90-day AI adoption roadmap your team can execute
Navigate responsible AI adoption with a practical ethics framework

curriculum.module: The real state of enterprise AI
curriculum.summary: What is actually shipping inside large organizations — and what stalls.
A structured audit of your people, processes, data, and risk posture.
Working session: prioritize use cases by value and feasibility, assign ownership.
Responsible AI patterns that accelerate adoption instead of blocking it.
